---
title: "BAN 502 – Course Project Phase 1"
author: "Siddharth Purohit"
output: word_document
---

## 1) Setup & Load Data

```{r, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)


train <- read.csv("train.csv")

```

```{r}
dim(train)
str(train)
summary(train)

```

```{r}
table(train$failure)
prop.table(table(train$failure))

```
```{r}
ggplot(train, aes(x = failure)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Failure Distribution", x = "Failure", y = "Count")

```
```{r}
na_count <- colSums(is.na(train))
na_pct <- round(100 * na_count / nrow(train), 2)

missing_summary <- data.frame(
  variable = names(na_count),
  missing_count = as.integer(na_count),
  missing_percent = na_pct
) |> 
  arrange(desc(missing_count))

missing_summary

```
```{r}
missing_summary |>
  filter(missing_count > 0) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable, missing_percent), y = missing_percent)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Missing Data Percent by Variable", x = "Variable", y = "Missing %")

```

```{r}
train_rowwise <- na.omit(train)
dim(train_rowwise)

```

```{r}
train_colwise <- train[, colSums(is.na(train)) == 0]
dim(train_colwise)

```

```{r}
list(
  original_dim = dim(train),
  rowwise_dim  = dim(train_rowwise),
  colwise_dim  = dim(train_colwise)
)

```
```{r}
# Convert failure to factor for grouping
train$failure <- as.factor(train$failure)

numeric_cols <- train |> select(where(is.numeric)) |> names()

means_by_failure <- train |>
  group_by(failure) |>
  summarise(across(all_of(numeric_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) 

means_by_failure

```
```{r}
ggplot(train, aes(x = failure, y = loading)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Loading by Failure", x = "Failure", y = "Loading")

```
```{r}
failure_rate_by_code <- train |>
  group_by(product_code) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    fail_rate = mean(failure == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(fail_rate))

failure_rate_by_code
```


```{r}
failure_rate_by_code |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(product_code, fail_rate), y = fail_rate)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Failure Rate by Product Code", x = "Product Code", y = "Failure Rate")

```
```{r}
measurement_missing <- missing_summary |>
  filter(str_detect(variable, "^measurement_")) |>
  arrange(desc(missing_percent))

measurement_missing

```
